title: Health Canada Quarterly Financial Reports - Canada.ca
content:
## Health Canada Quarterly Financial Reports
For the first three quarters of the year, Health Canada will provide a report which contains comparative financial information and highlights of year to date results. It also discusses risks and changes to operations, personnel and programs of the department. This information can be seen by visiting each of the following reports listed chronologically.
- Quarter ended December 31, 2025
- Quarter ended September 30, 2025
- Quarter ended June 30, 2025
- Quarter ended December 31, 2024
- Quarter ended September 30, 2024
- Quarter ended June 30, 2024
- Quarter ended December 31, 2023
- Quarter ended September 30, 2023
- Quarter ended June 30, 2023
- Quarter ended December 31, 2022
- Quarter ended September 30, 2022
- Quarter ended June 30, 2022
- Quarter ended December 31, 2021
- Quarter ended September 30, 2021
- Quarter ended June 30, 2021
- Quarter ended December 31 2020
- Quarter ended September 30 2020
- Quarter ended June 30 2020
- Quarter ended December 31 2019
- Quarter ended September 30 2019
